events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: residential service entrance & metering, rough-complete, observed field condition: undersized service conductors. Need decide pass/fail. Undersized service conductors violate NEC Art. 230 (service entrance conductors must have adequate ampacity per 230.42, 310.16, etc). So decision fail. Risk high or critical? Undersized service conductors can overheat, fire. Residential service entrance is critical maybe high. But categories: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 70. Confidence 0.95. Findings: service entrance conductors are undersized for the service rating/load. Actions: replace with properly sized conductors per NEC Article 230/310, recalculate load per Article 220, inspect/retest. Rationale. References: NEC Art. 230.42, 230.79, 310.16 maybe. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.

    "Service entrance conductors are undersized for the rated service and calculated load.",
    "Undersized conductors can overheat, damage insulation, and create a fire hazard at the service entrance and metering equipment."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify the service size and calculated load per NEC Article 220.",
    "Replace service entrance conductors with conductors sized per NEC Article 230 and 310.16 for the service rating.",
    "Re-inspect and test continuity/insulation resistance before energizing."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 230 requires service-entrance conductors to have sufficient ampacity for the load and service rating. Undersized conductors do not meet this requirement and present an overheating/fire hazard, so the installation fails compliance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 230",
    "NEC 230.42",
    "NEC 310.16"
  ]
}
